subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! His honor Nabil, who preceded Rida, upon him be the peace of God, the Lord of Names, besought God, the Lord of sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاءالله جناب نبیل قبل رضا علیه سلام الله مالک الاسماء سئل الله رب الملک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @goodly deeds; actions, @words vs deeds, @praise and encouragement
